basic_details.job_title: IIT Bombay Part-Time Coaches Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay (IIT Bombay) Part-Time Coaches Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website of IIT Bombay. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Bombay Part-Time Coaches Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in respective sport coaching + 4 years coaching experience, 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions, 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience + Represented the country in an International Competition
qualification.details: Part-Time Wall Climbing Instructor: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in wall climbing + 4 years coaching experience in wall climbing OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Wall climbing + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in Wall Climbing + Represented the country in an International Competition Part-Time Table Tennis Coach: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in Table Tennis coaching + 4 years coaching experience in Table Tennis OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Table Tennis + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in Table Tennis + Represented the country in an International Competition Part-Time Cricket Coach: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in cricket coaching + 4 years coaching experience in Cricket OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Cricket + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in cricket + Represented the country in an International Competition

content_sections.heading: IIT Bombay Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Bombay Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Bombay Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Bombay Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Part-Time Wall Climbing Instructor: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in wall climbing + 4 years coaching experience in wall climbing OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Wall climbing + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in Wall Climbing + Represented the country in an International Competition Part-Time Table Tennis Coach: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in Table Tennis coaching + 4 years coaching experience in Table Tennis OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Table Tennis + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in Table Tennis + Represented the country in an International Competition Part-Time Cricket Coach: Bachelor's Degree and 1 year duration Diploma in cricket coaching + 4 years coaching experience in Cricket OR 12th Std Pass + 6 years of Coaching/ Training experience in Cricket + participation in State / National/ All India Inter University competitions OR 12th Std. Pass + 4 year of Coaching/ Training experience in cricket + Represented the country in an International Competition

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Bombay Part-Time Coaches?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection date for the Part-Time Coaches posts at IIT Bombay is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Part-Time Coaches positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Part-Time Coaches positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,480 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for the Part-Time Coaches posts?
faq.answer: Eligibility includes a Bachelor's Degree with a diploma in the respective sport and coaching experience, or 12th pass with significant coaching experience and participation in competitions, or international representation.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Part-Time Coaches at IIT Bombay?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Part-Time Coaches posts at IIT Bombay, with one vacancy each for Wall Climbing Instructor, Table Tennis Coach, and Cricket Coach.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Part-Time Coaches positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Part-Time Coaches positions is 32 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Bombay Part-Time Coaches recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Part-Time Coaches roles?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Part-Time Coaches positions will be through a Walk-in Selection.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for IIT Bombay Part-Time Coaches to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the IIT Bombay office in Mumbai, Maharashtra (Pincode: 400076).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Part-Time Coaches positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Part-Time.
